5: Though the light-heavyweight division is the lowest tier of the championship, you surprised one and all by rising up as champion without the use of feral souls.

6: And you didn't stop there. When former heavyweight fighter Wicked Thunder unexpectedly appeared to challenge you, you bested her as well. Never have we seen such drama at the Arcadion!

7: Like most others, I watched your matches at the edge of my seat, but I've been most keen to hear your firsthand account. Pray spare no detail!

8: Hm-hm! Your words have provided me with insight and inspiration both! With a few embellishments, I believe I can produce a story that will grip the reader from start to finish!

11: You're not going to tell it as it happened?

12: Lest you misunderstand, my works are not intended to be accurate records of events. In the name of a good story, I may take some liberties with certain details.

13: For example...what if Black Cat had brought even deadlier techniques to bear against you?

14: Or if Honey B. Lovely, whose sweet facade concealed a terrible temper, had become further enraged?

15: What sort of carnage might have unfolded if the Brute Bomber had stooped to lower lows to seize victory?

16: And last but not least, what if Wicked Thunder refused to retreat, resolving instead to fight on?

17: In such a manner do I let my mind wander when I produce my works. And this time, I'm confident that I have a best seller on my hands!

18: I thank you for taking the time to share your account with me. I wish you continued success in the arena!

20: You wish to talk? I could tell you a little more about myself, I suppose...

21: I'm a cartoonist, as you know, and I primarily draw inspiration from the matches at the Arcadion.

22: My cartoons enjoy great popularity here in Solution Nine, even if I do say so myself.

23: And mark my words, my next series featuring you as the protagonist is guaranteed to be a best seller!
